# City Bakery & Confectionery

> Bakery in Chennai offering fresh birthday cakes, custom cakes, pastries and desserts, with delivery and pickup across 4 branches.

## About
City Bakery & Confectionery has been serving Chennai since 2015 with fresh cream cakes, chocolate cakes, premium cakes, and custom-designed celebration cakes.

## Branches
- Neelankarai: 3/462, Pandiyan Salai, Chennai - 600115
- Kottivakkam: OMR Road, Kottivakkam, Chennai - 600041
- Injambakkam: ECR Road, Injambakkam, Chennai - 600115
- Kandhanchavadi: Veeramani Salai, Kandanchavadi, Perungudi, Chennai

## Contact
Phone/WhatsApp: +91 7373730309
Hours: 9:00 AM - 10:00 PM, All Days

## Ordering
Orders can be placed via WhatsApp or the website's online ordering cart.
